content.text: EXAMPLE — classic first scan. Drawing: a smiley stick hero on the left, three floating horizontal platforms, a red spiky patch under the middle gap, a star top-right, and the handwritten words "3 LIVES".

{"primary_genre":"platformer","genre_confidence":0.93,"mood":"cheerful","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Smiley","bbox":[0.05,0.55,0.15,0.75],"style_ref":"blue-crayon-stick"},"entities":[{"id":"plat_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0.2,0.7,0.4,0.74],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"plat_2","role":"platform","bbox":[0.5,0.55,0.7,0.59],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"plat_3","role":"platform","bbox":[0.78,0.45,0.95,0.49],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"haz_1","role":"hazard","bbox":[0.42,0.85,0.5,0.92],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"red-spikes"},{"id":"goal_1","role":"goal","bbox":[0.86,0.3,0.94,0.4],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"yellow-star"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"goal_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"normal","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#3b6fb5","#000000","#e23b2e","#f5c518"],"assumptions":["The red spiky patch is a hazard that costs a life."],"flags":[]}
EXAMPLE — placemat maze. Drawing: a rectangle filled with corridor walls, a small mouse doodle at the top-left opening, a wedge of cheese at the bottom-right.

{"primary_genre":"maze","genre_confidence":0.9,"mood":"cheerful","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Mouse","bbox":[0.08,0.1,0.16,0.2],"style_ref":"grey-doodle"},"entities":[{"id":"wall_group","role":"platform","bbox":[0.05,0.05,0.95,0.95],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"corridor-walls"},{"id":"goal_1","role":"goal","bbox":[0.82,0.82,0.92,0.92],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"cheese-wedge"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"goal_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"normal","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#888888","#f5c518"],"assumptions":["The maze is top-down; the mouse reaches the cheese to win."],"flags":[]}
EXAMPLE — semantic physics, no color legend. Drawing: a hero, a blue pool labelled "water", an orange pool labelled "lava", a small spring, and a flag at the end.

{"primary_genre":"platformer","genre_confidence":0.88,"mood":"adventurous","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Hero","bbox":[0.03,0.6,0.13,0.8],"style_ref":"marker-figure"},"entities":[{"id":"water_1","role":"water","bbox":[0.25,0.8,0.45,0.95],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"blue-pool"},{"id":"lava_1","role":"hazard","bbox":[0.55,0.8,0.75,0.95],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"orange-pool"},{"id":"spring_1","role":"launchpad","bbox":[0.48,0.7,0.54,0.78],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"coil-spring"},{"id":"goal_1","role":"goal","bbox":[0.9,0.55,0.97,0.7],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"flag"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"goal_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"normal","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#2b6fb5","#e8791f","#000000"],"assumptions":["Water is a swim volume; lava is a hazard; the spring launches the hero. Roles come from what each thing is, not its color."],"flags":[]}
EXAMPLE — the absurd input (robustness). Drawing: a banana with legs and an angry face standing on a rainbow arc.

{"primary_genre":"runner","genre_confidence":0.6,"mood":"silly","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Angry Banana","bbox":[0.4,0.3,0.6,0.6],"style_ref":"yellow-banana-legs"},"entities":[{"id":"track_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0.05,0.6,0.95,0.75],"behavior":"static","style_ref":"rainbow-arc"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"track_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"chill","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#f5d000","#ff5aa8","#5ac8f5"],"assumptions":["The banana is the hero; the rainbow is a slide-path to run along. The angry face is just its expression."],"flags":["genre_uncertain"]}
